conversation.text: Hey Ashwin, welcome back! Great to see you again. You last visited Dr. Priya Sharma, your chiropractor, on 15 May. Your lower back pain was at a 7 out of 10 then. How are you feeling today? Is the back doing better?
Back is a little better, maybe a 5 now
Glad the back is improving! I am loging this in your heath general will help us in future

params.raw_input: Ashwin's Back is a little better, around 5/10

conversation.text: Hey Ashwin, do you have something more to converse about
yah, actually today I'm having some tooth pain, on eating cold I am filling sharp sensetion
if pain not too sever, I can suggest you some home remedies
No, It's sever pain I would like to consult with docter
Before I find you a dentist, I can see in your profile you do not have any medical insurance plan, if you have it add it in your profile will hep us to find best match for you
done, I have added!

Now I can see your insurance coverage is BlueCross BlueShield PPO Plan. This plan covers dental consultations at 80% after your deductible. You are good to go. Let me find the best dentists available for you.
As per the location mentioned in your profile, I found the doctor Meera Joshi, her clinik is just 2 miles away from your home, would you me like to book appointment with her?
Yes, book with Dr. Meera.

Before I confirm the booking, let me just collect a few quick details so Dr. Meera is fully prepared before your appointment. First — do you have any known allergies? Especially to any medications or anaesthesia?
Yes, I'm allergic to penicillin.
Got it, penicillin allergy noted. Are you currently taking any medications?
Yes I'm on Ibuprofen 400mg twice a day that Dr. Priya prescribed, and Vitamin D3.
Noted — Ibuprofen 400mg and Vitamin D3. Last question — any recent medical conditions or ongoing health issues Dr. Meera should know about before the appointment?

params.raw_input: Ashwin's is taking Ibuprofen 400mg and Vitamin D3. sugested by his chiropractor

conversation.text: Just the lower back issue and some anxiety.

Perfect, I have everything. I am preparing a pre-appointment health summary for Dr. Meera right now — your allergy, current medications, and health background. She will have this before you even walk in. Now, what day and time works for your appointment?
check if she is available for This Friday at 3 PM.

Hey Ashwin, I checked your calendar But you actually have your follow-up with Dr. Priya Sharma this Friday at 3 PM for your back. You cannot have both at the same time. Would you like to book Dr. Meera at a different time on Friday, or a different day entirely?
Book her for Friday 5 PM.
Perfect. Dr. Meera Joshi, Dentist, this Friday at 5 PM — with your allergy and medication notes already sent to her. Confirming now.

Done! You are all set. Dr. Priya at 3 PM for your back, Dr. Meera at 5 PM for your teeth. Both are on your calendar and both doctors have your pre-appointment health summary. Anything else you need today?
Actually yes, let me log today's update.
Of course — go ahead, tell me how you are feeling today.
Back pain is around 5 today, much better than last week. Slept around 6 hours. Tooth pain is a 6, especially when I drink something cold. Feeling a bit tired but anxiety is a little less than before.
Got it, I have logged that for you.

params.raw_input: Back pain is around 5 today, much better than last week. Slept around 6 hours. Tooth pain is a 6, especially when I drink something cold. Feeling a bit tired but anxiety is a little less than before.

conversation.text: Today's entry saved — back pain 5 out of 10, improving. Tooth pain 6 out of 10, cold sensitivity. Sleep 6 hours, energy low, anxiety mild. Dr. Priya and Dr. Meera will both be able to see this before your Friday appointments. You are doing well Ashwin — the trend is moving in the right direction.
Actually wait, cancel my appointment on Friday.
You have two appointments this Friday — Dr. Priya Sharma at 3 PM for your back, and Dr. Meera Kulkarni at 5 PM for your teeth. Which one would you like to cancel?
Cancel the dentist one.
Just confirming — you want to cancel Dr. Meera Kulkarni on Friday at 5 PM. Should I go ahead?
Yes.
Done. Dr. Meera's appointment has been cancelled. Your appointment with Dr. Priya at 3 PM is still confirmed. Would you like to reschedule the dentist for another day?
No that's fine for now, thanks.

Anytime Ashwin. To recap today — your follow-up with Dr. Priya is confirmed for Friday at 3 PM, your health journal is updated, and your pre-appointment notes are ready for her. RedApple is always here whenever you need it — whether it is booking, tracking your health, or just talking through how you are feeling. Take care and hope the back continues to improve!
